title: Cryptool unveils the new landing page
content_html:
The new Cryptool landing page is here.

It is built around a single idea: one-click crypto management. The new design makes it clear what the platform does and who it is for, and gives investors and fund managers a much faster way to understand the value Cryptool brings.

This is the first public-facing piece of the platform. The modules behind it are next.
author: Cryptool
